title: CombatControl
description: CombatControl is a Paper 1.21.11 PvP combat plugin with combat tagging, anti-logout, configurable item restrictions, and unique-item limits.
body:
CombatControl is a competitive PvP control plugin for Paper 1.21.11.

  ### Features
  - Combat tagging when players deal or receive PvP damage
  - Configurable combat timer with XP bar/level display
  - Optional actionbar and bossbar combat status
  - Anti-logout: players can be punished if they leave during combat
  - Configurable blocking of combat items/actions (Riptide, Elytra, Fireworks, Enderpearls, Wind Charges, etc.)
  - Unique-item limitation system for Mace and Spear variants
  - Optional global inventory/container checks for unique-item limits
  - `/combat reload` to reload configuration
  - `/unique` overview for current unique item ownership
  - Admin bypass and debug permissions

  ### Commands
  - `/combat reload`
  - `/combat debug limits`
  - `/unique`

  ### Permissions
  - `combatcontrol.reload` (default: op)
  - `combatcontrol.debug` (default: op)
  - `combatcontrol.bypass` (default: false, only if enabled in config)

  ### Compatibility
  - Loader: Paper
  - Minecraft: 1.21.11 (also works on many 1.21.x Paper builds)

  ### Languages
  - German
  - English
  - French
  - Hindi 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 CombatControl ist ein kompetitives PvP-Control-Plugin für Paper 1.21.11.

  ### Features
  - Combat-Tag bei verursachtem oder erlittenem PvP-Schaden
  - Konfigurierbarer Combat-Timer mit XP-Bar/Level-Anzeige
  - Optionale Actionbar- und Bossbar-Anzeige
  - Anti-Logout: Strafe bei Disconnect im Combat
  - Konfigurierbares Blockieren von Combat-Items/Aktionen (Riptide, Elytra, Raketen, Enderperlen, Wind Charges usw.)
  - Unique-Item-Limits für Mace- und Spear-Varianten
  - Optionales globales Inventory/Container-Checking für Unique-Limits
  - `/combat reload` zum Neuladen der Config
  - `/unique` Übersicht der Unique-Item-Besitzer
  - Admin-Bypass und Debug-Rechte
